acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Closed Issue with stale running run is reconciled exactly once
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Startup and periodic idempotency regressions pass.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Merged PR and exact merge commit remain linked
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Normalized reconciliation response is preserved in runtime state.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Open or active run is never finalized
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Canonical game-api guard result is respected.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Lost responses do not duplicate events
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Stable operation identity and retry tests pass.
301 tests, 100% coverage, zero Credo issues and zero Dialyzer errors.

summary: Terminal AgentRun reconciliation is deployed-compatible, idempotent and validated on the rebased exact HEAD.
